describers.move: moved the laser cannon to the right

checks.notShotAllAliens: You didn't shoot down all the aliens.
checks.tooManyLines: Your solution has too many lines of code. Try using a repeat loop inside another repeat loop to make it shorter!

nestedRepeatShoot.name: Use nested repeat loops to shoot all the aliens
nestedRepeatShoot.description: Find the pattern in the alien positions and use a repeat loop inside another repeat loop to destroy them all in 7 lines of code or fewer.

nestedRepeatShoot.name: Nested Repeat and Shoot
nestedRepeatShoot.description: Use nested repeat loops to shoot all the aliens

cantGetTo7Lines.question: I can't get to 7 lines of code.
cantGetTo7Lines.answer:
Think about this level as two blocks of things that need to happen.

- The first block is the inner one, where we shoot 4 times - make sure that is three lines long.
- The outer block is the inner block with some movement either side. That outer block needs to be repeated a few times too.

If you structure your code in this way, it should naturally end up at 7 lines of code.

move.description: Moves the laser cannon **one position to the right**. If you move off the right edge of the screen, you lose!

shoot.description: Shoots the laser upwards. **Only shoot when there's an alien above you**, or you lose the game!
